title: Claru SEO Content Pages (/solutions/[slug])
description: Build 11 data-driven content pages at /solutions/[slug] targeting low-competition, high-value buyer-intent keywords in the AI training data space. Each page pulls real data from Supabase datasets + case study JSONs, cites 5-8 research papers, and goes through a multi-agent copy QA review loop.

stories.title: Create Shared ContentPageData Type System and Data Loading Utilities
stories.description: Create the type system, page registry, and server-side data loading utilities so all subsequent page data files and components have a typed foundation.
acceptance_criteria: Create src/data/content-pages/types.ts with ContentPageData interface matching design doc specification
Create src/data/content-pages/index.ts with getContentPage(slug), getAllContentPageSlugs(), getAllContentPages() functions
Create src/lib/case-studies-server.ts with getCaseStudyData(slug) function using fs.readFileSync
CaseStudyData interface includes: slug, title, teaser, headlineStat, headlineStatLabel, results array, approach, processSteps
Export ResearchCitation interface from types: id, title, authors, venue, year, url, keyClaim
All types are strict — no any types
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Create /solutions Layout with JSON-LD, OG Images, Canonical URLs, Breadcrumbs
stories.description: Create the shared layout that injects structured data (BreadcrumbList, Service, FAQPage JSON-LD), OG image metadata, and canonical URLs for all content pages.
acceptance_criteria: Create src/app/solutions/layout.tsx as a server component
Layout injects three JSON-LD schemas: BreadcrumbList, Service (linked to Organization), FAQPage
JSON-LD uses canonical base URL https://claru.ai
Service schema includes dateModified with build date
OG image URL generated via ogImageUrl(title, { category: 'solution' }) from src/lib/og.ts
Add 'solution' to VALID_CATEGORIES in src/app/api/og/route.tsx with config: { badge: 'SOLUTION', borderColor: '#92B090', titlePrefix: '' }
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Create Shared Page Template Components
stories.description: Create the reusable section components: ContentPageTemplate, ContentHero, ProblemSection, DatasetComparison, InlineCaseStudy, ResearchCitations, ContentFAQ, CitationLink.
acceptance_criteria: Create ContentPageTemplate.tsx (server component) — composes all sections from ContentPageData
Create ContentHero.tsx (server component) — breadcrumb nav, H1, subtitle, CTA
Create ProblemSection.tsx (server component) — question-form H2, answer-first paragraphs, citations, callout
Create DatasetComparison.tsx (server component) — responsive table/cards with #121210 bg, #92B090 accent
Create InlineCaseStudy.tsx (server component) — reads case study JSON, renders metrics, methodology excerpt
Create ResearchCitations.tsx (server component) — numbered reference list with external links
Create ContentFAQ.tsx (client component) — expandable accordion, keyboard accessible
Create CitationLink.tsx (server component) — simple anchor tag for inline citations
All components follow design system: #0a0908 bg, #92B090 accent, #FFFFFF text
Reuses existing DatasetShowcase, WorkforceStats, FinalCTA, Button
InlineCaseStudy returns null with console.warn if case study JSON missing
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Create Dynamic [slug]/page.tsx Route with generateStaticParams
stories.description: Create the dynamic route that maps slugs to page data and renders ContentPageTemplate with build-time validation.
acceptance_criteria: Create src/app/solutions/[slug]/page.tsx as a server component
generateStaticParams() returns all slugs from getAllContentPageSlugs()
generateMetadata() returns title, description, keywords, canonical URL, OG image
revalidate = 3600 for 1-hour ISR
Unknown slugs call notFound() returning 404
Build-time validation warns on missing case studies and out-of-range FAQ counts
Page renders ContentPageTemplate with resolved ContentPageData
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Tier 1 Data Files — Egocentric Video Data + VLA Training Data
stories.description: Create two pillar-tier page data files: egocentric-video-data.ts and vla-training-data.ts with research-backed copy, citations, dataset comparisons, FAQs, and case study mappings.
acceptance_criteria: egocentric-video-data.ts exports typed ContentPageData with citations: EgoDex, EgoScale, Ego4D, DROID, Open X-Embodiment
vla-training-data.ts exports typed ContentPageData with citations: pi-0, GR00T N1.5, OpenVLA, RT-2, Octo
Every citation has real URL, correct arxiv ID, and keyClaim matching source paper
Dataset comparison tables have accurate scale numbers from source papers
FAQ answers are self-contained and answer-first
Meta titles 50-60 chars, meta descriptions 150-160 chars
H2 headings are question-form
All case study slugs reference existing JSONs
Pages render locally (npm run build succeeds)
Content QA agent verifies citation accuracy, copy quality, SEO optimization
Code review agent verifies types, data integrity, no runtime errors

stories.title: Tier 1 Data Files — Red Teaming Data + Video Generation Training Data
stories.description: Create two pillar-tier page data files: red-teaming-data.ts and video-generation-training-data.ts.
acceptance_criteria: red-teaming-data.ts exports typed ContentPageData with citations: EU AI Act, Anthropic Constitutional Classifiers, OpenAI red teaming, NIST AI RMF
video-generation-training-data.ts exports typed ContentPageData with citations: VideoReward, VidGen-1M, Flow-DPO
Red teaming page accurately represents EU AI Act requirements (Articles 55, 99, enforcement dates)
Video generation page cites correct arXiv IDs and paper claims
Same quality criteria as US-005 (typed exports, real citations, accurate tables, answer-first FAQs, SEO meta)
Pages render locally
Content QA agent review passes
Code review agent passes

stories.title: Tier 2 Data Files — Manipulation Trajectory Data + Expert RLHF Annotation
stories.description: Create two cluster-tier page data files: manipulation-trajectory-data.ts and expert-rlhf-annotation.ts.
acceptance_criteria: manipulation-trajectory-data.ts exports typed ContentPageData with citations: AgiBot World, DROID, Open X-Embodiment, GEN-0
expert-rlhf-annotation.ts exports typed ContentPageData with citations: MM-RLHF, RLTHF, cost analysis
Expert RLHF page includes concrete cost comparison data (crowdsourced vs expert)
Manipulation trajectory page accurately describes action space representations
Same quality criteria as US-005
Pages render locally
Content QA agent review passes
Code review agent passes

stories.title: Tier 2 Data Files — Sim-to-Real Data + Teleoperation Data
stories.description: Create two cluster-tier page data files: sim-to-real-data.ts and teleoperation-data.ts.
acceptance_criteria: sim-to-real-data.ts exports typed ContentPageData with citations: ABB/NVIDIA HyperReality, Sim2Real-VLA
teleoperation-data.ts exports typed ContentPageData with citations: HumanPlus, ACE, Open-TeleVision
Sim-to-real page explains domain gap problem with specific examples from cited research
Teleoperation page covers hardware/interface considerations from cited papers
Same quality criteria as US-005
Pages render locally
Content QA agent review passes
Code review agent passes

stories.title: Tier 3 Data Files — Comparison/Guide Articles (3 Pages)
stories.description: Create three comparison/guide page data files: open-datasets-vs-custom.ts, crowdsourced-vs-expert-rlhf.ts, eu-ai-act-red-teaming.ts.
acceptance_criteria: open-datasets-vs-custom.ts has accurate comparison table: Open X-Embodiment vs DROID vs AgiBot World vs custom
crowdsourced-vs-expert-rlhf.ts includes specific failure mode examples with citations: RLTHF, MM-RLHF, Secrets of RLHF Part II
eu-ai-act-red-teaming.ts correctly represents enforcement dates (Feb 2025, Aug 2025, Aug 2026) and article numbers (55, 99)
Same quality criteria as US-005
Pages render locally
Content QA agent review passes
Code review agent passes

stories.title: Content QA Review Loop — All 11 Pages
stories.description: Dedicated content review pass across all 11 pages to verify citation accuracy, copy quality, SEO optimization, and factual claims.
acceptance_criteria: Every citation URL resolves (not 404/dead link)
Claimed numbers in dataset comparison tables match source papers
keyClaim text on each citation accurately represents the paper's finding
Copy doesn't read like AI-generated marketing fluff
FAQ answers are self-contained and answer-first
Primary keyword appears in H1, at least one H2, and meta description
H2 headings are question-form
Meta titles 50-60 chars, meta descriptions 150-160 chars
All critical issues resolved and re-verified

stories.title: Code Review — All Components, Data Types, SSR Rendering, JSON-LD Validity
stories.description: Comprehensive code review of all new files to verify TypeScript correctness, server/client boundaries, JSON-LD validity, and performance.
acceptance_criteria: All server components do NOT import client-only libraries
All client components have 'use client' directive
JSON-LD output parses as valid JSON and validates against schema.org types
generateStaticParams correctly enumerates all slugs
generateMetadata produces correct canonical URLs, OG images, descriptions
revalidate = 3600 is set on the dynamic route
notFound() called for unknown slugs
No any types or unsafe type assertions
InlineCaseStudy gracefully handles missing case study JSONs
npm run build succeeds with zero errors

stories.title: Add All Solutions Pages to Sitemap
stories.description: Include all 11 solutions pages in the sitemap for Google indexing.
acceptance_criteria: Import getAllContentPages from src/data/content-pages/index.ts in src/app/sitemap.ts
Map all content page slugs to sitemap entries with url, changeFrequency: monthly, priority: 0.8
Verify sitemap output includes all 11 URLs after build
No duplicate URLs in sitemap
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Playwright E2E Tests — All 11 Pages Render
stories.description: E2E tests verifying all content pages render correctly with proper structured data.
acceptance_criteria: Create tests/e2e/content-pages.spec.ts

For each of 11 slugs: page loads HTTP 200, exactly 1 h1, question-form h2s, BreadcrumbList JSON-LD present, FAQPage JSON-LD with 3-5 items, Service JSON-LD present, canonical link matches /solutions/{slug}, og:image meta present
FAQ accordion expands/collapses on click
Research citations section has at least 3 references with external links
Test uses data-driven pattern parameterized across all 11 slugs
Test runs against local dev server
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Playwright MCP UAT — Visual Verification
stories.description: Visual user acceptance testing via Playwright MCP browser automation at desktop and mobile viewports.
acceptance_criteria: Test at least 3 representative pages (1 Tier-1: egocentric-video-data, 1 Tier-2: expert-rlhf-annotation, 1 Tier-3: open-datasets-vs-custom) at desktop (1440px) and mobile (375px)
Take screenshots of hero, comparison table, inline case study, FAQ section
Verify breadcrumb navigation is visible and clickable
Verify dataset showcase renders cards if page has datasetIds
Verify no console errors
Verify responsive layout — table becomes cards on mobile
Verify OG image renders at /api/og?title=...&category=solution
Document any visual issues and fix critical blockers

stories.title: Post-Deploy GSC — Re-submit Sitemap and Verify Indexing
stories.description: Re-submit sitemap to GSC, verify all 11 new /solutions/ URLs are discoverable, check for indexing issues.
acceptance_criteria: Re-submit sitemap via GSC MCP submit_sitemap
Verify sitemap processes with 0 errors and URL count increased by 11
Batch inspect all 11 /solutions/ URLs via batch_url_inspection
Check indexing issues — no robots blocks, no noindex, no fetch errors
Verify /robots.txt does NOT block /solutions/
Document initial crawl status in tasks/docs/gsc-sitemap-verification.md

stories.title: GSC — Monitor Indexing Progress and Request Crawling
stories.description: 3-7 days post-deploy: check indexing progress, diagnose any pages not yet crawled, verify FAQ rich results.
acceptance_criteria: Batch inspect all 11 URLs for current status
For unindexed pages: run enhanced inspection for diagnostics
Check search analytics for /solutions/ page impressions
Compare overall site performance before/after deploy
Verify FAQ rich results showing for indexed pages
Report table: all 11 URLs with status, last crawl, rich results

stories.title: GSC — Keyword Performance Baseline for Solution Pages
stories.description: Establish keyword performance baseline at deploy time so we can measure impact at 30 and 60 days.
acceptance_criteria: Capture current rankings for all 11 target keywords plus long-tail variants and plural/singular forms
Include SERP features column (FAQ rich results, sitelinks, AI Overview citations)
Save baseline to tasks/docs/gsc-keyword-baseline.md with date stamp
Record impressions, clicks, CTR, avg position per keyword at deploy date
Schedule 30-day and 60-day follow-up checks in progress.txt

stories.title: AEO/GEO Validation — Optimize All Pages for AI Answer Engines
stories.description: Validate and optimize all 11 solution pages for AEO (Google AI Overviews, Featured Snippets, PAA) and GEO (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity citations).
acceptance_criteria: AEO: Every H2 is question-form, first paragraph is self-contained 40-80 word answer
AEO: 3-5 FAQPage JSON-LD Q&As per page targeting long-tail PAA queries
AEO: First 150 words contain primary keyword and extractable definition
GEO: Every page includes proprietary Claru data (case study metrics) not available elsewhere
GEO: Each page has at least 1 named Claru methodology/framework that LLMs can quote
GEO: Every factual claim anchored to citation or case study metric — no unsubstantiated assertions
GEO: Pages are fully SSR — curl returns H1 and content without JS execution
GEO: 'Claru' entity name appears 3+ times in body copy (not just we/our)
GEO: Each semantic section independently comprehensible out of context
GEO: Comparison tables include Claru as a named row
GEO: Research citations include claim + source inline for LLM extraction
GEO: relatedSlugs and pillarLinks populated on every page for cross-linking
GEO: public/llms.txt updated with all 11 /solutions/ URLs and descriptions
Verify robots.txt allows GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot on /solutions/
Baseline check: search ChatGPT/Perplexity for target queries, document if Claru appears
